condition: Severe shoulder injury suspected to be a rotator cuff tear or ligament damage
onset: About two weeks after lifting a heavy object
pain_location: Front and side of the shoulder, sometimes extending down to the arm
pain_nature: Sharp pain during hand movements; throbbing pain during rest; frequent intense tingling sensations
duration: About two weeks without significant relief
previous_history: Occasional strain due to exercise before this incident
functional_limitations: Raising my arm or lifting the shoulder is extremely difficult
medical_history: No major medical conditions, overall health is normal
red_flags: Large swelling in the area (about 8-9 inches), spreading pain, numbness and tingling in the hand
treatments_taken: Anti-inflammatory medications, resting, consulting with a doctor but no significant treatment recommended
